message:
fix(sync): resolve relative temp paths before containment check (#238)

require_safe_sync_overwrite_path compared relative paths like
`.beads/issues.jsonl.<pid>.tmp` against the absolute beads_dir path,
causing starts_with() to always return false. This made auto-flush
silently skip the JSONL export with "Refusing to rename temp file
outside .beads".

Fix: resolve relative paths against cwd before the containment check,
matching the pattern already used in export_to_jsonl_with_policy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
